checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt is present and doesn't specifically block AI bots
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
Found 1 JSON-LD blocks: WebSite
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Moderate semantic HTML: 8 semantic elements vs 52 divs
Poor accessibility: only 257/452 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 1/1 inputs have names
No stable test selectors found (data-testid, data-cy, etc.)
Good server-side rendering — content available without JavaScript
Multiple h1 headings (2) — ambiguous page title
Heading hierarchy has 2 level skip(s) (e.g., h1 → h3)
1 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 450/451 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Returns 405 but missing Allow header

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~15,238 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 8% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 13 — clean structure
Page read cost: $0.019–$0.229 per load
267 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

checks.name: a11y
findings: Missing essential landmarks: main
No images found
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
No custom tabindex — relying on natural focus order (fine for simple pages)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 302ms
Compact payload: 60KB
3 redirects — long chain slows agents and may cause loops
Lean resources: 1 scripts, 0 styles, 0 images
Compression enabled: gzip
